title: dactylorhiza majalis subsp. majalis
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. majalis, also known as the Summer Lady's Tresses, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. The medicinal properties of Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. majalis include its ability to act as a vasodilator, and its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing inflammation, improving blood circulation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. majalis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
